scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,web -c blue,cyan,magenta "npm -w packages/shared run dev" "npm -w apps/server run dev" "npm -w apps/web run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w packages/shared run build && npm -w apps/server run build && npm -w apps/web run build && npm -w apps/cli run build
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm -w packages/shared run build && npm -w packages/shared run test && npm -w apps/server run test && npm -w apps/web run test
